Package org.rodinp.core.emf.lightcore

Interface LightObject

All Superinterfaces:
org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EObject, org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.Notifier
All Known Subinterfaces:
Attribute, ImplicitElement, InternalElement, LightElement
All Known Implementing Classes:
AttributeImpl, ImplicitElementImpl, InternalElementImpl, LightElementImpl, LightObjectImpl
public interface LightObject extends org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EObject
A representation of the model object 'Light Object'.

  • Method Details

    • getContaining

      LightObject getContaining(org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EClass eClass)
      returns the nearest container of this element that is a sub-type eClass or null if no container of that type
      Parameters:
      the - EClass that is the super-type of the returned elements
      Returns:
      containing EventBObject that is a sub-type of eClass

    • getAllContained

      org.eclipse.emf.common.util.EList<org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EObject> getAllContained(org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EClass eClass, boolean resolve)
      returns a list of elements that sub-type eClass and that are contained (directly or indirectly) by this element
      Parameters:
      eClass - - the EClass that is the super-type of the returned elements
      resolve - - whether to resolve proxies
